import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing line 1")?
  let line2 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing line 2")?
  let toks1 = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  let toks2 = string.split_whitespace(line2)
  let n = toks1.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let s1 = toks1.get(i).ok_or("idx1")?
    let s2 = toks2.get(i).ok_or("idx2")?
    let a = string.parse_int(s1).ok_or("parse1")?
    let b = string.parse_int(s2).ok_or("parse2")?
    let s = a + b
    println("#{a}+#{b}=#{s}")
    i = i + 1
  end
  Ok(())
end
